title: strychnos mitis
intro: Strychnos mitis, also known as the yellow fruit strychnine tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Strychnos mitis include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-diarrheal agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and seeds are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from various health issues.
